name: mageaustralia/maho-module-checkoutsuccess
description: Configurable checkout success page for Maho. Four-slot layout (top / middle-left / middle-right / bottom), per-slot sortable block picker, thank-you panel, guest quick-register CTA, order details + addresses, recurring profile schedule, CMS blocks above/below the grid, and a custom HTML/tracking-snippet box with order-variable substitution. Includes a signed admin preview that renders the success page for any historical order.
